title: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 Day 1: Software Factories & Keynotes
summary: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 Day 1 livestream from Moscone West in San Francisco on June 30, 2026. Programming includes keynote sessions and main-stage talks focused on software factories and AI engineering topics.
writeup: This video is the Day 1 livestream of AI Engineer World's Fair 2026, held June 30, 2026 at Moscone West in San Francisco. The program covers keynote sessions and main-stage talks centered on software factories and AI engineering topics. It documents how the conference frames current work in AI engineering across its opening day.
